sp_widget.css: /* No CSS here. Add via Tasker Theme */
sp_widget.description:
Create a new widget for tasks modal popup, based off of widget Tasker Modal - Reopen Tasks
2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish'
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Publish Draft Tasks
sp_widget.template: ${Tasker - Please choose to publish only the top task or all of its subtasks as well}
